@graph.description: Schisandra (Schisandra chinensis) is a five-flavor berry used in TCM as an adaptogen and liver tonic. Its primary lignans (schisandrin A/B/C) support hepatocyte detoxification via CYP450 modulation and exhibit antioxidant activity. Human data support mild stress reduction and liver enzyme normalization in hepatitis populations.
@graph.name: Schisandra (Schisandra chinensis)
